titleZh: 变更后的公司法治理重构：综合综述
titleEn: Transformative Updates to China’s Corporate Governance: A Comprehensive Overview of the 2023 Amendment to PRC Company Law
abstractZh: 梳理新《公司法》对治理框架、董事会制度和股东权利安排的关键变化，适合与条文、司法解释联读。
abstractEn: A practical synthesis of the 2023 amendment, covering governance restructuring, board structure, and shareholder rights.
